## Checklist

- [ ] I read the README
- [ ] Build passes locally (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] If this changes user-visible behavior, the README / screenshots reflect it
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, real attendee data, or event-specific tokens in any committed file
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
